title: Brainrot Creatures (PROJECT DISCONTINUED)
body:
## **I'm not working on this project anymore, as I am leaving the Internet indefinitely. More info will come soon.**

This mod was created with Mcreator.

GO CHECK OUT THE OFFICAL WEBSITE: [https://sites.google.com/view/brainrotcreaturesmod/home?authuser=0](https://sites.google.com/view/brainrotcreaturesmod/home?authuser=0)
